message:
🌱 Add traefik: OpenTelemetry Support mission (#1629)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-6374-opentelemetry-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: OpenTelemetry Support",
+    "description": "OpenTelemetry Support. Requested by 69+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current traefik deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your traefik version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nhelm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working traefik installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik\n```\n**Feature**\n\nOpenTelemetry Support - https://opentelemetry.io/\n\nIt seems OpenTracing (https://opentracing.io/) and OpenCensus have merged to form OpenTelemetry \n\nCould we look to add support / migrate in a future release."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for OpenTelemetry Support",
+        "description": "Would the Traefik team be interested in having a community member take this on?  I'd be happy to take a stab at it. If you are, what shape would you prefer it to take? I'm imagining that it makes sense to add support for OpenTelemetry alongside OpenCensus at this time, but I also understand that\n```yaml\ntracing:\n  opentelemetry:\n    exporters:\n      otlp:\n        endpoint: localhost:4317\n        protocol: grpc\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"OpenTelemetry Support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Would the Traefik team be interested in having a community member take this on?  I'd be happy to take a stab at it.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "tracing:\n  opentelemetry:\n    exporters:\n      otlp:\n        endpoint: localhost:4317\n        protocol: grpc",
+        "opentelemetry:\n  exporters:\n    otlp:\n      endpoint:  localhost:4317\n      protocol: grpc\n  tracingEnabled: true\n  metricsEnabled: true",
+        "opentelemetry:\n  tracing:\n    exporters:\n      otlp:\n        endpoint:  localhost:4317\n        protocol: grpc\n  metrics:\n    exporters:\n      otlp:\n        endpoint:  localhost:4317\n        protocol: grpc"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "traefik",
+      "community",
+      "ingress",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "traefik"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/6374",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik"
+    },
+    "reactions": 69,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:43:44.199Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
